component.name: 启航 AI 编程助手
component.summary: 启航 AI 编程助手（Claude Code、Codex、Gemini CLI）

description.p: 启航 AI 编程助手 is a cross-platform desktop app for managing and switching provider configurations for Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI.

ul.li: Manage multiple provider configurations and endpoints
One-click switch and sync to client live configurations
